title: Dental Restoration * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Dental Restoration * Disabilities Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues Older Adults Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DENTAL LIFELINE NETWORK DONATED DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental services to older adults, people with disabilities, and medically fragile individuals through a network of volunteer dentists and dental labs. A volunteer dentist will come up with a treatment plan, with the goal of making sure the patient is pain-free and able to eat properly. Does not provide emergency care. Services may include: -Dental cleanings -Cavity prevention (sealants, fluoride treatments/supplements) -Dental prosthodontics (dentures, bridges, crowns, implants) -Orthodontics -Endodontics -Dental restoration -Periodontics -Oral/maxillofacial surgery -Cosmetic dentistry 1800 15th Street Suite 100 Denver, CO 80202 Eligibility: Veterans and individuals who cannot pay for dental care and who are age 65 and older, have a permanent disability, or are medically compromised. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (503) 594-0837 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
